### Sales Skills Tier List [BATCH-061]

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                       SALES SKILLS TIER LIST                                 |
|                    (Do Mais ao Menos Importante)                             |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                              |
|  S-TIER: ESSENTIAL (Nao vende sem)                                           |
|  +-- Tonality Control                                                        |
|  +-- Objection Prevention (in discovery)                                     |
|  +-- Active Listening (4 Rules)                                              |
|                                                                              |
|  A-TIER: HIGH IMPACT                                                         |
|  +-- Question Sequencing (NEPQ flow)                                         |
|  +-- Problem Awareness Questions                                             |
|  +-- Gap Building                                                            |
|                                                                              |
|  B-TIER: IMPORTANT                                                           |
|  +-- Status Frame Setting                                                    |
|  +-- Consequence Questions                                                   |
|  +-- Two Truths Discovery                                                    |
|                                                                              |
|  C-TIER: USEFUL                                                              |
|  +-- Cold Call Pattern Interrupt                                             |
|  +-- Calendar Commitment                                                     |
|  +-- Verbal Pacing                                                           |
|                                                                              |
|  D-TIER: LEAST IMPORTANT                                                     |
|  +-- "Closing Techniques" (substituidas por 3 Commitment Q's)                |
|  +-- Hard Selling                                                            |
|  +-- Pressure Tactics                                                        |
|                                                                              |
|  "If you master S and A tier, you're in the top 5% of salespeople.           |
|   Most focus on D tier - that's why they struggle."                          |
|                                             -- Jeremy Miner [BATCH-061]      |
|                                                                              |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

### 4 High-Pressure Techniques to AVOID [BATCH-062]

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                4 HIGH-PRESSURE TECHNIQUES TO AVOID                           |
|                  (Destroem Trust e Close Rate)                               |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                              |
|  1. ASSUMPTIVE CLOSE PREMATURO                                               |
|  +-- "So, which package works best for you?"                                 |
|  +-- Problema: Antes de discovery, dispara resistencia                       |
|  +-- NEPQ: Usar assumptive APENAS apos Commitment Q2                         |
|                                                                              |
|  2. FALSE URGENCY                                                            |
|  +-- "This price is only good today"                                         |
|  +-- Problema: Prospects sao inteligentes, percebem                          |
|  +-- NEPQ: Criar urgencia REAL via Consequence Questions                     |
|                                                                              |
|  3. HARD TAKEAWAY                                                            |
|  +-- "If you don't decide now, I can't help you"                             |
|  +-- Problema: Agressivo, cria antagonismo                                   |
|  +-- NEPQ: Soft takeaway - "This might not be for everyone..."               |
|                                                                              |
|  4. MANIPULATION TACTICS                                                     |
|  +-- NLP tricks, anchoring manipulation, guilt trips                         |
|  +-- Problema: Funciona 1x, destroi referrals                                |
|  +-- NEPQ: Genuine curiosity, prospect se vende                              |
|                                                                              |
|  REGRA: Se voce se sentiria desconfortavel recebendo a tecnica,              |
|         NAO USE.                                                             |
|                                                                              |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

### 9 NEPQ Budgeting Questions [BATCH-062]

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                    9 NEPQ BUDGETING QUESTIONS                                |
|                      (B2B vs B2C Variations)                                 |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                              |
|  B2C QUESTIONS:                                                              |
|                                                                              |
|  1. "Have you set aside any resources for this?"                             |
|  2. "What kind of investment were you thinking?"                             |
|  3. "What have you invested in similar solutions before?"                    |
|  4. "If this could solve your problem, what would that be worth to you?"     |
|  5. "Is budget something that would hold you back?"                          |
|                                                                              |
|  B2B QUESTIONS:                                                              |
|                                                                              |
|  6. "Do you have budget allocated for this initiative?"                      |
|  7. "What's the typical investment range for projects like this?"            |
|  8. "Who controls the budget for this type of decision?"                     |
|  9. "If we could show clear ROI, is budget still a concern?"                 |
|                                                                              |
|  TIMING: Fazer apos Problem Awareness, antes de Solution Awareness           |
|                                                                              |
|  POR QUE FUNCIONA:                                                           |
|  +-- Previne objecao de preco no final                                       |
|  +-- Voce sabe se vale continuar a call                                      |
|  +-- Pode ajustar apresentacao ao budget real                                |
|  +-- Elimina "price shoppers" cedo                                           |
|                                                                              |
|  TONALIDADE: Curious, nao interrogativo                                      |
|                                                                              |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

### 7 Expanded Probing Questions [BATCH-064]

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                   7 EXPANDED PROBING QUESTIONS                               |
|                     (Lead-in Phrases Incluidas)                              |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                              |
|  LEAD-IN PHRASES (Antes da pergunta):                                        |
|  +-- "And..."                                                                |
|  +-- "Oh..."                                                                 |
|  +-- "So when you say..."                                                    |
|  +-- "Help me understand..."                                                 |
|  +-- "I'm curious..."                                                        |
|                                                                              |
|  7 PROBING QUESTIONS:                                                        |
|                                                                              |
|  1. "Tell me more about that..."                                             |
|     +-- Quando: Prospect diz algo interessante                               |
|     +-- Efeito: Mais detalhes, mais profundidade                             |
|                                                                              |
|  2. "What do you mean by that?"                                              |
|     +-- Quando: Termo vago ou ambiguo                                        |
|     +-- Efeito: Clareza, especificidade                                      |
|                                                                              |
|  3. "How so?"                                                                |
|     +-- Quando: Prospect faz afirmacao geral                                 |
|     +-- Efeito: Exemplos concretos                                           |
|                                                                              |
|  4. "What's that been like for you?"                                         |
|     +-- Quando: Problema identificado                                        |
|     +-- Efeito: Conexao emocional                                            |
|                                                                              |
|  5. "And then what happened?"                                                |
|     +-- Quando: Prospect conta historia                                      |
|     +-- Efeito: Continuacao, mais contexto                                   |
|                                                                              |
|  6. "Why is that important to you?"                                          |
|     +-- Quando: Prospect menciona objetivo                                   |
|     +-- Efeito: Motivacao profunda                                           |
|                                                                              |
|  7. "What would it mean if you could solve this?"                            |
|     +-- Quando: Problema bem estabelecido                                    |
|     +-- Efeito: Visualizacao do outcome                                      |
|                                                                              |
|  REGRA: Use emotional word echo - repita palavras emocionais deles           |
|         Ex: "You said 'frustrated' - tell me more about that frustration"    |
|                                                                              |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

---

## Frameworks de Objecao

### Objecao: "I need to think about it" [BATCH-061, BATCH-065]

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                     OBJECAO: "I need to think about it"                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                              |
|  DIAGNOSTICO: Provavelmente discovery incompleto (70% smokescreen)           |
|                                                                              |
|  RESPOSTA NEPQ (3-Step Formula):                                             |
|                                                                              |
|  STEP 1 - CLARIFY:                                                           |
|  "That's totally fine. And just so I understand... [TONALIDADE: CURIOUS]     |
|   when you say you need to think about it, is it more about:                 |
|                                                                              |
|   - Whether this is the right solution? [pausa]                              |
|   - Whether now is the right time? [pausa]                                   |
|   - The investment? [pausa]                                                  |
|   - Or something else I might have missed?"                                  |
|                                                                              |
|  STEP 2 - DISCUSS:                                                           |
|  [Baseado na resposta, explore mais]                                         |
|  "Tell me more about that..."                                                |
|  "What specifically are you unsure about?"                                   |
|                                                                              |
|  STEP 3 - DIFFUSE:                                                           |
|  [Responda a objecao REAL]                                                   |
|                                                                              |
|  PRINCIPIO: Clarificar ANTES de responder                                    |
|  99% dos vendedores assumem e respondem errado                               |
|                                                                              |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

### Objecao: "I need to talk to my spouse" [BATCH-060, BATCH-061]

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                     OBJECAO: "I need to talk to my spouse"                   |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                              |
|  DIAGNOSTICO: 70% sao smokescreens para objecao real                         |
|                                                                              |
|  PREVENCAO (25-50% da call) [BATCH-060]:                                     |
|  "When it comes to making a decision like this,                              |
|   is there anyone else who would need to weigh in,                           |
|   or is it just you?"                                                        |
|                                                                              |
|  SE JA ACONTECEU - RESPOSTA NEPQ [BATCH-061]:                                |
|                                                                              |
|  "Makes total sense. [TONALIDADE: UNDERSTANDING]                             |
|                                                                              |
|   Let me ask you... if your [spouse] said 'Whatever you think is best,       |
|   I trust your judgment' - what would YOU decide?"                           |
|                                                                              |
|   [ESPERAR - resposta revela verdadeira objecao]                             |
|                                                                              |
|  SE AINDA INSISTIR:                                                          |
|                                                                              |
|  "Before I go... what parts specifically do you need to discuss with them?"  |
|                                                                              |
|  PRINCIPIO: "Before I go" = guarda baixa                                     |
|  Real concern emerge quando pensam que voce vai embora                       |
|                                                                              |
|  VARIACAO B2C [BATCH-061]:                                                   |
|  "I totally get it. Most people like to run big decisions by their spouse.   |
|   Just curious though - when you discuss it with them, what do you think     |
|   their main concern will be?"                                               |
|                                                                              |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

### Objecao: "It's too expensive" [BATCH-065]

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                     OBJECAO: "It's too expensive"                            |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                              |
|  DIAGNOSTICO: Raramente e sobre dinheiro. E sobre VALOR percebido.           |
|                                                                              |
|  STEP 1 - CLARIFY:                                                           |
|  "When you say expensive, is it more about:                                  |
|   - The total investment?                                                    |
|   - The monthly payment?                                                     |
|   - Or compared to something else you were expecting?"                       |
|                                                                              |
|  STEP 2 - DISCUSS (baseado na resposta):                                     |
|                                                                              |
|  Se TOTAL:                                                                   |
|  "What were you expecting to invest?"                                        |
|  "What would make this feel like a worthwhile investment?"                   |
|                                                                              |
|  Se MONTHLY:                                                                 |
|  "What monthly amount would feel comfortable?"                               |
|  "How does this compare to what the problem is costing you now?"             |
|                                                                              |
|  Se COMPARISON:                                                              |
|  "What were you comparing it to?"                                            |
|  "What's the difference in what they offer vs what we offer?"                |
|                                                                              |
|  STEP 3 - DIFFUSE:                                                           |
|  "Let me ask you... if this investment could [result specific],              |
|   would that change how you see the [price]?"                                |
|                                                                              |
|  REFRAME PODEROSO:                                                           |
|  "It's not expensive or cheap - it's either worth it or it's not.            |
|   Based on what you told me, does it feel worth it to solve [problem]?"      |
|                                                                              |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

### Objecao: "I saw negative reviews" [BATCH-065]

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                    OBJECAO: "I saw negative reviews"                         |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                              |
|  RESPOSTA NEPQ (99.8% Reframe):                                              |
|                                                                              |
|  "I appreciate you bringing that up. [TONALIDADE: UNDERSTANDING]             |
|                                                                              |
|   Let me ask you... we've helped over 351,000 salespeople.                   |
|   If even 0.2% had a negative experience, that's still 700 people.           |
|                                                                              |
|   But 99.8% had a positive experience.                                       |
|                                                                              |
|   The question is: do you see yourself more as someone                       |
|   in the 99.8% or the 0.2%?                                                  |
|                                                                              |
|   [PAUSA - deixe responderem]                                                |
|                                                                              |
|   And out of curiosity, what specifically in those reviews                   |
|   concerned you?"                                                            |
|                                                                              |
|  POR QUE FUNCIONA:                                                           |
|  +-- Nao nega os reviews (validacao)                                         |
|  +-- Reframes como percentual                                                |
|  +-- Faz prospect se identificar com maioria                                 |
|  +-- Pergunta final clarifica concern real                                   |
|                                                                              |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

### Objecao: "Let me check with my business partner" [BATCH-061]

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|              OBJECAO: "Let me check with my business partner"                |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                              |
|  PREVENCAO (no inicio da call):                                              |
|  "When it comes to decisions like this, who else would need to be involved?" |
|                                                                              |
|  SE JA ACONTECEU:                                                            |
|                                                                              |
|  "Totally makes sense to loop them in.                                       |
|   [TONALIDADE: UNDERSTANDING]                                                |
|                                                                              |
|   Just curious - when you talk to them, what do you think                    |
|   their main questions or concerns will be?                                  |
|                                                                              |
|   [PAUSA]                                                                    |
|                                                                              |
|   And what's YOUR feeling about this?                                        |
|   If your partner said 'whatever you think is best',                         |
|   what would you decide?"                                                    |
|                                                                              |
|  VARIACAO AGRESSIVA (com rapport):                                           |
|  "Before I let you go... if there was no partner to consult,                 |
|   just you making this decision right now - what would you do?"              |
|                                                                              |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

### Objecao: "I'm traveling / busy this week" [BATCH-066]

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|               OBJECAO: "I'm traveling / busy this week"                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                              |
|  PREVENCAO (Travel Commitment Pre-Check) [BATCH-066]:                        |
|                                                                              |
|  No inicio da call:                                                          |
|  "Before we dive in, do you have any trips or major commitments              |
|   coming up in the next week or two that might affect our timeline?"         |
|                                                                              |
|  SE JA ACONTECEU:                                                            |
|                                                                              |
|  "No problem at all. [TONALIDADE: UNDERSTANDING]                             |
|                                                                              |
|   When you get back, what's your schedule looking like?                      |
|   [PAUSA]                                                                    |
|                                                                              |
|   Let's lock in a specific time now so we don't lose momentum.               |
|   What day works best - [Option A] or [Option B]?"                           |
|                                                                              |
|  SE RESISTIR A AGENDAR:                                                      |
|                                                                              |
|  "I totally understand. Here's my concern though...                          |
|   9 out of 10 people who say 'call me when I'm back'                         |
|   never actually connect again. [BATCH-067]                                  |
|                                                                              |
|   I don't want that to happen to you, especially since                       |
|   you seemed genuinely interested in solving [problem].                      |
|                                                                              |
|   Can we at least get something on the calendar?"                            |
|                                                                              |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

### Objecao: "It seems too good to be true" [BATCH-066]

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|              OBJECAO: "It seems too good to be true"                         |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                              |
|  RESPOSTA NEPQ (Humor + Reframe):                                            |
|                                                                              |
|  [TONALIDADE: PLAYFUL]                                                       |
|  "Ha! You know what? I'd be skeptical too.                                   |
|                                                                              |
|   Here's the thing though... it IS good. Really good.                        |
|   But it's not magic. It works for people who [qualification].               |
|                                                                              |
|   Let me ask you - what specifically feels too good?                         |
|   Is it the results? The timeline? The price?                                |
|                                                                              |
|   [PAUSA - deixe responderem]"                                               |
|                                                                              |
|  ALTERNATIVA (Status Frame):                                                 |
|  "I get it. Here's some context...                                           |
|   We've trained 351,000 salespeople across 158 industries.                   |
|   The results you're seeing aren't outliers - they're typical                |
|   for people who actually implement the system.                              |
|                                                                              |
|   What would you need to see to feel confident this could work for you?"     |
|                                                                              |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

### Objecao: "Just Looking" (Retail) [BATCH-062]

```
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                    OBJECAO: "Just Looking" (Retail)                          |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                                              |
|  PREVENCAO (Nao pergunte "posso ajudar"):                                    |
|                                                                              |
|  Em vez de: "Can I help you with anything?"                                  |
|  Dizer: "Hey! Looking for anything specific today, or just browsing?"        |
|                                                                              |
|  SE JA DISSERAM "Just Looking":                                              |
|                                                                              |
|  [TONALIDADE: CURIOUS + PLAYFUL]                                             |
|  "Totally fine! Most people are just looking initially.                      |
|                                                                              |
|   Just curious - what caught your eye that made you stop here?"              |
|                                                                              |
|   [PAUSA]                                                                    |
|                                                                              |
|  ALTERNATIVA:                                                                |
|  "No pressure at all. If you don't mind me asking though -                   |
|   what kind of [produto] have you looked at before?"                         |
|                                                                              |
|  POR QUE FUNCIONA:                                                           |
|  +-- Valida que "just looking" e OK                                          |
|  +-- Abre conversa sem pressao                                               |
|  +-- Transforma browsing em discovery                                        |
|                                                                              |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

---

## Armadilhas

### Ser Entusiasmado Demais

Entusiasmo tradicional de vendedor dispara defesas. NEPQ usa neutralidade - voce esta genuinamente tentando entender se e fit, nao vendendo.

### Responder Objecao Sem Clarificar

99% dos vendedores ouvem objecao e comecam a responder. NEPQ: clarificar primeiro. "Quando voce diz X, e mais sobre A, B, ou C?"

### Pular Consequence Questions

Se voce nao amplifica a dor de NAO resolver, o prospect nao tem urgencia. "O que acontece se nada mudar nos proximos 6 meses?" e crucial.

### Falar Depois de Commitment Question 2

Depois de "Why do you feel like it is, though?" - SILENCIO. Cada palavra que eles dizem e auto-persuasao. Interromper = quebrar o spell.

### Usar Closing Techniques Tradicionais [BATCH-061]

Closing e D-Tier skill. O que importa e S-Tier: Tonality, Objection Prevention, Listening. Se voce precisa "fechar", o discovery foi fraco.

### Ignorar First Truth [BATCH-066]

8 em 10 prospects mentem na primeira resposta. Probe deeper. "And what else?" revela Second Truth.

### Ser Agressivo Demais [BATCH-062]

4 tecnicas a evitar: Assumptive close prematuro, false urgency, hard takeaway, manipulation tactics.

### Falar Mais que 15% da Call [BATCH-063]

Se voce esta falando mais que 10-15%, esta perdendo a venda. 85%+ deve ser o prospect falando.

---

## Citacoes Originais

> "People buy because of what you ASK, not what you SAY."
> -- Jeremy Miner [JM-CORE]

> "Tonality is 70% of communication. Same words, different tone = different response."
> -- Jeremy Miner [JM-TON]

> "When they tell you WHY they want it, they're telling themselves. That's the magic."
> -- Jeremy Miner [JM-COM]

> "82% of salespeople feel uncomfortable using traditional sales techniques."
> -- Pesquisa North America [JM-REF]

> "Traditional sales creates resistance. NEPQ dissolves it."
> -- Jeremy Miner [JM-CORE]

> "8 out of 10 prospects lie on their first answer. The second answer is where the truth lives."
> -- Jeremy Miner [BATCH-066]

> "If you're talking more than 10% after Commitment Question 2, you're losing the sale."
> -- Jeremy Miner [BATCH-063]

> "Closing techniques are D-Tier skills. Tonality and objection prevention are S-Tier."
> -- Jeremy Miner [BATCH-061]

> "The prospect who says 'I need to think about it' is usually saying 'You didn't help me think about it enough.'"
> -- Jeremy Miner [BATCH-065]

> "9 out of 10 leads who leave without buying never come back. But 99% are still looking."
> -- Jeremy Miner [BATCH-067]
